description: Dashboard Empty State & Welcome Experience: When user opens dashboard with no data (no tasks, events, habits), show an engaging welcome state with a warm greeting, quick action cards, AI suggestion chips, and a small onboarding checklist widget. The page should feel alive even with zero data.
steps: 1. In app/dashboard/page.tsx, detect when all data arrays are empty (tasks.length === 0 && events.length === 0 && habits.length === 0) after loading completes.
2. When empty, render a dedicated WelcomeState section instead of the current stats/schedule/tasks sections. This should include:
3. A warm personalized greeting: 'Welcome back, {firstName}! Let's get your day started.' with a subtle wave or sparkle animation.

4. Quick Action Cards (3-4 cards in a grid): 'Create your first task' (links to /dashboard/tasks with create modal trigger), 'Check your calendar' (links to /dashboard/calendar), 'Start a habit' (links to /dashboard/habits), 'Talk to AI' (opens chat panel). Each card should have an icon, title, and short description. Matte flat design with subtle hover color shift.
5. AI Suggestion Chips: A row of clickable pill-shaped buttons like 'Plan my week', 'Suggest a routine', 'Help me focus', 'Organize my tasks'. When clicked, open the chat panel (setChatOpen(true)).

6. A small onboarding checklist widget showing progress: checkboxes for 'Create a task', 'Add a calendar event', 'Start a habit', 'Try focus mode'. Check marks should reflect actual data (if tasks > 0, mark that done). Persist checklist dismissal in localStorage.
7. Keep the existing data-populated view as-is for when the user has data. The empty state only shows when ALL data sources return empty.
8. Style everything with the matte Notion-style design: warm colors, no glass, flat cards, readable text, generous spacing.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes without errors
When dashboard has no data, a warm welcome state is shown instead of blank content
Quick action cards are present and link to appropriate pages
AI suggestion chips open the chat panel when clicked
An onboarding checklist shows progress based on actual data
When data exists, the normal dashboard view shows (not the welcome state)
Design follows matte/flat Notion style with warm accents
